metadata.description: George Song's Claude Code plugins for git, GitHub, documentation, session memory, Codex integration, repo maintenance, and utilities

plugins.name: ai-docs
plugins.description: Full lifecycle AI documentation for Claude Code projects: bootstrap, lookup, update, check, and audit

plugins.name: ai-memory
plugins.description: Session memory and project instruction management for Claude Code

plugins.name: codex-tools
plugins.description: OpenAI Codex CLI integration for parallel PR reviews and headless task delegation

plugins.name: gh-tools
plugins.description: GitHub CLI PR review, comment posting, triage, and project management commands

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git commit, worktree, and auto-squash commands

plugins.name: repo-maintenance
plugins.description: Dependency upgrades and CI/CD security auditing for project repositories
